metadata.description: Expanded behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes (12 rules), forked from Karpathy's observations

plugins.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
plugins.description: 12-rule expanded behavioral guidelines: Think Before Coding, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, Goal-Driven Execution, Use Model for Judgment, Token Budgets, Surface Conflicts, Read Before Write, Tests Verify Intent, Checkpoint, Match Conventions, Fail Loud
